ORDER TERMINATING GPS REQUIREMENT FILED IN OPEN COURT

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING & DEFENSE MOTION FOR 17(B) REDUCTION/X:LOVE WAIVER/INVOFF:COLIN PATINO/WITEXCL:DEFENSE/WIT SWORN DA:IRENE TEJEDA/X:MS, TEJEDA IS BEING ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED COURT INTERPRETER, MANTI HENRIQUEZ,/WIT SWORN DA:SFPD OFFICER COLIN PATINO/DEFT WV CPX/871D: 1,2/SATERM/X:CRIMINAL PROTECTIVE ORDER FILED 06-07-18 IS HEREBY TERMINATED,/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING & PROOF OF ELECTRONIC MONITORING/X:PER DEFENSE COUNSEL, DEFENDANT IS HOSPITALIZED 5150 AT CPMC/X:COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TOGO BEYOND LAST DAY,/STIPLD:08-06-18 (60TH DAY)/CONTD PROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND STAYED TO 06-28-18/X:BAIL SET AT $50000/CONTD:BENCH WARRANT STAY FOR FTA PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOPC/
/CAL:PROOF OF ELECTRONIC MONITORING ENROLLMENT/LDPX: 06-21-18/DAWT/X:PER DEFENSE COUNSEL, DEFENDANT IS IN THE POSADA HOUSE,/X:PRELIMINARY HEARING DATE OF 06-20-18 IS CONFIRMED,/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDPX: 06-21-18/987,2/OR/SAORD/SA2:IRENE T,/SAORD2/SA3:622 PARIS STREET, SF, CA 94112/SAORD3/DEF:IS ORDERED RELEASED ON PRE-TRIAL ELECTRONIC MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN/BWDNC/X: BAIL REMAINS AT $50000 WITHOUT PREJUDICE/X: LOVE WAIVER/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:BENCH WARRANT STAY/STIPLD:08-06-18/NP/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING & BENCH WARRANT STAY/DOPC/
/CAL:BENCH WARRANT STAY/STIPLD:08-06-18/NP/X:SUBPOENAED RECORDS RELEASED TO DEFENSE COUNSEL WITHOUT STIPULATION,/CONT/DOPC/
/CAL:PROOF OF ENROLLMENT OF ELECTRONIC MONITORING/NP/CONT/DOPC/X:FUTURE DATE OF 06-20-18 IS CONFIRMED/
